info.title: Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.LanguageServer
info.description: An MCP server to bring the C# Language Server to LLMs.

options.name: --debug
options.description: Flag indicating if the debugger should be launched on startup.

options.name: --brokeredServicePipeName
options.description: The name of the pipe used to connect to a remote process (if one exists).

options.name: --starredCompletionComponentPath
options.description: The location of the starred completion component (if one exists).

options.name: --telemetryLevel
options.description: Telemetry level, Defaults to 'off'. Example values: 'all', 'crash', 'error', or 'off'.

options.name: --sessionId
options.description: Session Id to use for telemetry

options.name: --extension
options.description: Full paths of extension assemblies to load (optional).

options.name: --devKitDependencyPath
options.description: Full path to the Roslyn dependency used with DevKit (optional).

options.name: --razorSourceGenerator
options.description: Full path to the Razor source generator (optional).

options.name: --razorDesignTimePath
options.description: Full path to the Razor design time target path (optional).

options.name: --extensionLogDirectory
options.description: The directory where we should write log files to

options.name: --pipe
options.description: The name of the pipe the server will connect to.

options.name: --stdio
options.description: Use stdio for communication with the client.
